en.extract:
The Tanimbar megapode or Tanimbar scrubfowl (Megapodius tenimberensis) is a small megapode endemic to the Tanimbar Islands of  Indonesia. It is sometimes considered to be a subspecies of the orange-footed scrubfowl, Megapodius reinwardt.
It is a terrestrial bird the size of a domestic chicken, which is found in a range of forest and scrub habitats.
It feeds on seeds, fallen fruit and terrestrial invertebrates.  Like other megapodes, it nests in large mounds of sand, leaf litter and other debris where the heat generated by the decomposition of organic material serves to incubate the eggs.


References

Jones, Darryl N.; Dekker, Rene W.R.J.; & Roselaar, Cees S. (1995). The Megapodes. Oxford University Press: Oxford. ISBN 0-19-854651-3

The '''Tanimbar megapode''' or '''Tanimbar scrubfowl''' ('''''Megapodius tenimberensis''''') is a small [[megapode]] [[endemism|endemic]] to the [[Tanimbar Islands]] of  [[Indonesia]]. It is sometimes considered to be a [[subspecies]] of the [[orange-footed scrubfowl]], ''Megapodius reinwardt''.

It is a terrestrial bird the size of a domestic [[chicken]], which is found in a range of forest and scrub [[habitat]]s.

It feeds on seeds, fallen fruit and terrestrial [[invertebrate]]s.  Like other megapodes, it nests in large mounds of sand, leaf litter and other debris where the heat generated by the decomposition of organic material serves to incubate the [[bird egg|eggs]].

== References ==
{{Reflist}}

zh.extract:
塔岛塚雉（学名：Megapodius tenimberensis）是一种分布在印度尼西亚塔宁巴尔群岛的小型塚雉。有时被视为橙脚塚雉的一个亚种。
这是一种体型与家鸡相当的陆生鸟类，生活森林和灌木丛生境中。
这种鸟以种子、掉落的果实和陆生无脊椎动物为食。像其他塚雉一样，它们会使用沙子、落叶和其他有机碎片筑巢，并通过有机物质分解产生的热量孵化卵。


参考文献

Jones, Darryl N.; Dekker, Rene W.R.J.; & Roselaar, Cees S. (1995). The Megapodes. Oxford University Press: Oxford. ISBN 0-19-854651-3
